# Pin the source commit in `.skills-upstream-sha` at the repo root.
# Refresh by running `scripts/sync-skills.sh`.
#
# Lines starting with '#' and blank lines are ignored.
# Skill directories listed here will be wiped and replaced on every sync —
# do not edit their contents in this repo, edit upstream and re-sync.
